projects.name: paintedd.art
projects.description: An artists portfolio website built as art in itself.

detail.story: Full creative freedom, to observe the artist, learn about them and their work, and create a website that reflects their unique style and personality. The site is ever evloving as living art does.
evolution: Initial brief: Linktree Alternative on a custom domain
Added a full catcha style gallery
Added an events page to share upcoming shows and exhibitions
Designed a pipeline to auto compress images into 3 tiers, thumbnail, medium and high res original with reduced file size, all with burned in watermarks
